experience.title: Corporate Project Manager
experience.description: Manage direct reports supporting multiple locations with annual revenues of $2M. Accountable for the strategic direction, implementation, support, and development of all business applications, Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP), Facilities Management, Financials, Forecasting and Procurement.

experience.title: Director of Information Technology and Systems
experience.description: Responsible for managing and executing business development activities for IT and other company business lines. Provided executive leadership over internal company-wide IT infrastructure.

experience.title: Director of Information Technology and Systems
experience.description: Manage four hotels within REIT interfacing with both management and ownership to guide the hotel through day-to-day operations. Insure that the company's strategic technologies needs are the primary focus.

extra_fields.certifications: ITIL Foundation Course, Microsoft Certified Professional (MCP), CompTia A+, CompTia N+
